question_en: How do you feel when you are given a blank canvas, clay, or a blank file with no instructions?
question_hi_en: Jab aapko bina kisi instructions ke ek blank canvas, clay ya file milti hai, toh aap kaisa feel karte hain?

options.option_en: I focus on applying my specific technical skills to create something precise.
options.option_hi_en: Main apni specific technical skills ka use karke kuch perfect banane par focus karta hoon.

options.option_en: I silently explore the material and test its limits before deciding what to make.
options.option_hi_en: Main chupchap material ko explore karta hoon aur kuch bhi banane se pehle uski limits test karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quickly sketch a structured plan and build it step-by-step.
options.option_hi_en: Main jaldi se ek structured plan banata hoon aur use step-by-step banata hoon.

options.option_en: I try to mix different ideas and styles to see what unique combination emerges.
options.option_hi_en: Main alag-alag ideas aur styles ko mix karke dekhta hoon ki kya naya ban sakta hai.

options.option_en: I think of a grand vision that will impress others and lead my friends to help me.
options.option_hi_en: Main ek bada vision sochta hoon jo sabko impress kare aur doston ko help karne ke liye motivate kare.

options.option_en: I just start creating immediately, adapting and changing the design as I go.
options.option_hi_en: Main turant banana shuru kar deta hoon, aur jaise-jaise aage badhta hoon design badalta rehta hoon.

question_en: How do you organize your workspace, files, and tasks when starting a new project?
question_hi_en: Naya project shuru karte waqt aap apna workspace, files aur tasks kaise organize karte hain?

options.option_en: I arrange only the exact, specialized tools I need for my specific task.
options.option_hi_en: Main sirf unhi specialized tools ko arrange karta hoon jo mere specific kaam ke liye zaroori hain.

options.option_en: I gather a lot of research materials and keep them quietly accessible around me.
options.option_hi_en: Main bohot saari research materials ikattha karta hoon aur unhe aas-paas rakhta hoon.

options.option_en: I create a highly logical folder structure and a strict step-by-step schedule.
options.option_hi_en: Main ek highly logical folder structure aur strict step-by-step schedule banata hoon.

options.option_en: I set up a flexible system that links different categories and topics together.
options.option_hi_en: Main ek flexible system banata hoon jo alag-alag categories aur topics ko jodta hai.

options.option_en: I organize the main goals on a big board so the whole team can see the vision.
options.option_hi_en: Main main goals ko ek bade board par rakhta hoon taaki poori team vision dekh sake.

options.option_en: I don't over-organize; I just jump in and organize things naturally as the project grows.
options.option_hi_en: Main zyada organize nahi karta; bas kaam shuru kar deta hoon aur zaroorat ke hisab se arrange karta hoon.

question_en: If you start a small weekend business with friends, what role do you take?
question_hi_en: Agar aap doston ke sath ek chota weekend business shuru karte hain, toh aap kya role lenge?

options.option_en: The technical expert who creates the main product flawlessly.
options.option_hi_en: Technical expert jo bina kisi galti ke main product banata hai.

options.option_en: The researcher who quietly studies the market and customer behavior.
options.option_hi_en: Researcher jo chupchap market aur customer behavior study karta hai.

options.option_en: The operations manager who sets up the supply chain and financial system.
options.option_hi_en: Operations manager jo supply chain aur financial system set karta hai.

options.option_en: The versatile coordinator who connects marketing, sales, and product design.
options.option_hi_en: Versatile coordinator jo marketing, sales aur product design ko connect karta hai.

options.option_en: The CEO who pitches the idea to everyone and inspires the team.
options.option_hi_en: CEO jo sabko idea pitch karta hai aur team ko inspire karta hai.

options.option_en: The creative hustler who tries different selling tactics and adapts on the fly.
options.option_hi_en: Creative hustler jo alag-alag selling tactics try karta hai aur jaldi adapt karta hai.

question_en: What do you do when you see an error message or a problem in a system?
question_hi_en: Jab aap kisi system mein error message ya problem dekhte hain, toh aap kya karte hain?

options.option_en: I focus deeply to fix the specific technical bug using my core skills.
options.option_hi_en: Main apni core skills ka use karke us specific technical bug ko fix karne par deep focus karta hoon.

options.option_en: I read the logs silently and analyze the root cause before taking action.
options.option_hi_en: Main chupchap logs padhta hoon aur action lene se pehle root cause analyze karta hoon.

options.option_en: I logically trace the steps in the system architecture to find where it broke.
options.option_hi_en: Main system architecture ke steps ko logically trace karta hoon taaki pata chale kahan galti hui.

options.option_en: I look for outside-the-box solutions by comparing it with similar problems in other tools.
options.option_hi_en: Main doosre tools ki similar problems se compare karke outside-the-box solutions dhoondhta hoon.

options.option_en: I take charge, inform the team, and direct resources to get it fixed fast.
options.option_hi_en: Main responsibility leta hoon, team ko inform karta hoon aur ise jaldi theek karwane ke liye resources direct karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quickly try multiple different workarounds until something works.
options.option_hi_en: Main jaldi se kayi alag-alag workarounds try karta hoon jab tak kuch kaam na kar jaye.

question_en: How do you prefer to handle a broken household appliance or device?
question_hi_en: Ghar ki kharab hui machine ya device ko theek karne ka aapka kya tareeka hai?

options.option_en: I use my precise tools to carefully repair the exact broken component.
options.option_hi_en: Main apne precise tools ka use karke us exact broken component ko dhyan se theek karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quietly observe how it failed and research the mechanics online.
options.option_hi_en: Main chupchap observe karta hoon ki yeh kaise kharab hua aur online mechanics research karta hoon.

options.option_en: I follow a step-by-step repair manual and systematically reassemble it.
options.option_hi_en: Main step-by-step repair manual follow karta hoon aur ise systematically wapas jodata hoon.

options.option_en: I use a creative hack or mix parts from other broken things to make it work.
options.option_hi_en: Main koi creative hack lagata hoon ya doosri kharab cheezon ke parts mix karke ise chalata hoon.

options.option_en: I guide someone else to fix it while managing the rest of the household tasks.
options.option_hi_en: Main kisi aur ko ise theek karne ke liye guide karta hoon jabki main doosre kaam sambhalta hoon.

options.option_en: I just start unscrewing it and figure out the problem as I go along.
options.option_hi_en: Main bas ise kholna shuru kar deta hoon aur theek karte hue problem samajhta hoon.

question_en: How would you like to spend a Saturday afternoon working on a personal project?
question_hi_en: Aap Saturday ki dopahar kisi personal project par kaise bitana pasand karenge?

options.option_en: Perfecting a highly specialized, complex skill all by myself.
options.option_hi_en: Akele kisi highly specialized, complex skill ko perfect karte hue.

options.option_en: Deep in quiet research, reading, and making solitary observations.
options.option_hi_en: Shaanti se deep research, reading aur solitary observations karte hue.

options.option_en: Building a structured, logical framework or planning a complex system.
options.option_hi_en: Ek structured, logical framework ya complex system plan karte hue.

options.option_en: Jumping between different hobbies, reading, and learning diverse topics.
options.option_hi_en: Alag-alag hobbies, reading aur diverse topics seekhne ke beech jump karte hue.

options.option_en: Leading a group initiative, motivating friends, and discussing big ideas.
options.option_hi_en: Kisi group initiative ko lead karte hue, doston ko motivate karte aur big ideas discuss karte hue.

options.option_en: Trying an unplanned, spontaneous activity and adapting to whatever happens.
options.option_hi_en: Kisi unplanned activity ko try karte hue aur jo bhi ho uske hisab se adapt karte hue.

question_en: What do you do if you notice a slow part in your team's workflow that others have not mentioned?
question_hi_en: Agar aapko team ke workflow mein koi slow part dikhe jiske baare mein kisi ne baat nahi ki, toh aap kya karenge?

options.option_en: I optimize my specific task within that workflow to the highest level.
options.option_hi_en: Main us workflow mein apne specific task ko highest level tak optimize karta hoon.

options.option_en: I silently collect data on the delays to confirm the exact root cause.
options.option_hi_en: Main chupchap delays ka data collect karta hoon taaki exact root cause confirm kar saku.

options.option_en: I redesign the structural process and propose a logical, efficient system.
options.option_hi_en: Main process ko redesign karta hoon aur ek logical, efficient system propose karta hoon.

options.option_en: I connect ideas from other departments to suggest a versatile workaround.
options.option_hi_en: Main doosre departments ke ideas connect karke ek versatile workaround suggest karta hoon.

options.option_en: I call a meeting, highlight the issue, and rally the team to implement a big fix.
options.option_hi_en: Main meeting bulata hoon, issue highlight karta hoon aur team ko bada fix laagu karne ke liye motivate karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quickly test a new, unconventional method on the spot to speed things up.
options.option_hi_en: Main turant on-the-spot ek naya, unconventional method test karta hoon taaki kaam fast ho jaye.

question_en: What do you do when a group project starts with no clear plan or leader?
question_hi_en: Jab kisi group project ki shuruat bina kisi plan ya leader ke hoti hai, toh aap kya karte hain?

options.option_en: I immediately claim the specific technical task I am best at and start working.
options.option_hi_en: Main turant woh specific technical task le leta hoon jisme main best hoon aur kaam shuru kar deta hoon.

options.option_en: I step back quietly, observe the group dynamics, and start gathering information.
options.option_hi_en: Main thoda piche hokar chupchap group dynamics dekhta hoon aur information gather karna shuru karta hoon.

options.option_en: I create a structured roadmap, assign timelines, and build a logical framework.
options.option_hi_en: Main ek structured roadmap banata hoon, timelines assign karta hoon aur logical framework taiyar karta hoon.

options.option_en: I chat with everyone to synthesize their diverse ideas into a combined approach.
options.option_hi_en: Main sabse baat karke unke diverse ideas ko ek combined approach mein jodta hoon.

options.option_en: I boldly step up as the leader, set a grand vision, and assign roles to everyone.
options.option_hi_en: Main confidence ke sath leader banta hoon, ek bada vision set karta hoon aur sabko roles assign karta hoon.

options.option_en: I suggest we just start experimenting right away and adapt our plan dynamically.
options.option_hi_en: Main suggest karta hoon ki hum turant experiment karna shuru karein aur plan dynamically change karein.

question_en: How do you react when project requirements change completely halfway through?
question_hi_en: Jab project ki requirements aadhi raah mein poori tarah badal jayein, toh aapka reaction kya hota hai?

options.option_en: I focus on re-tuning my specific technical contribution to meet the new standard.
options.option_hi_en: Main apne specific technical contribution ko naye standard ke hisab se re-tune karne par focus karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quietly analyze the new requirements and read up on the necessary background.
options.option_hi_en: Main chupchap nayi requirements ko analyze karta hoon aur zaroori background padhta hoon.

options.option_en: I dismantle the old plan and systematically build a new logical step-by-step roadmap.
options.option_hi_en: Main purane plan ko hatakar systematically ek naya logical step-by-step roadmap banata hoon.

options.option_en: I find creative ways to merge our previous work with the new diverse requirements.
options.option_hi_en: Main purane kaam ko nayi diverse requirements ke sath jodne ke creative tareeke dhoondhta hoon.

options.option_en: I keep the team's morale high, re-pitch the new vision, and guide the pivot.
options.option_hi_en: Main team ka morale high rakhta hoon, naya vision pitch karta hoon aur pivot guide karta hoon.

options.option_en: I am thrilled! I drop the old stuff instantly and dive into the new challenge.
options.option_hi_en: Main khush ho jata hoon! Purani cheezein chhodkar turant naye challenge mein kood padta hoon.

question_en: Why do you work hard and stay up late on a project?
question_hi_en: Aap kisi project par der raat tak mehnat kyun karte hain?

options.option_en: Because I want my specific piece of work to achieve absolute perfection and mastery.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki main chahta hoon ki mera specific kaam absolute perfection aur mastery achieve kare.

options.option_en: Because my curiosity keeps me digging deeper into the data and hidden facts.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki meri curiosity mujhe data aur hidden facts ki aur gehrai mein le jati hai.

options.option_en: Because I need to finish designing the perfect structural system and logical workflow.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki mujhe perfect structural system aur logical workflow design karna poora karna hota hai.

options.option_en: Because I get caught up exploring all the fascinating, diverse tangents of the topic.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki main topic ke alag-alag fascinating aur diverse angles explore karne mein kho jata hoon.

options.option_en: Because I want to deliver a massive impact that impresses everyone and achieves the grand goal.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki main ek bada impact deliver karna chahta hoon jo sabko impress kare aur goal poora kare.

options.option_en: Because a sudden burst of spontaneous energy hit me and I just went with the flow.
options.option_hi_en: Kyunki achanak ek spontaneous energy aati hai aur main bas flow ke sath chalta jata hoon.

question_en: How do you handle sharing tasks and decisions in a team?
question_hi_en: Team mein tasks aur decisions share karte waqt aapka kya approach hota hai?

options.option_en: I prefer to take full ownership of one specialized area and work independently on it.
options.option_hi_en: Main kisi ek specialized area ki poori responsibility lene aur us par akele kaam karne ko prefer karta hoon.

options.option_en: I listen quietly to others' opinions and make my decisions based on solid research.
options.option_hi_en: Main doosron ki opinions chupchap sunta hoon aur solid research ke basis par decisions leta hoon.

options.option_en: I rely on a structured delegation system where every role is logically defined.
options.option_hi_en: Main ek structured delegation system par depend karta hoon jahan har role logically defined ho.

options.option_en: I like bouncing ideas around to merge different perspectives into a unified choice.
options.option_hi_en: Mujhe ideas discuss karna pasand hai taaki alag-alag perspectives ko jodkar ek choice banai ja sake.

options.option_en: I take the initiative to finalize the big decisions and guide the team's direction.
options.option_hi_en: Main bade decisions final karne ka initiative leta hoon aur team ki direction guide karta hoon.

options.option_en: I stay flexible, taking up whatever task is needed at the moment without rigid rules.
options.option_hi_en: Main flexible rehta hoon, aur bina kisi rigid rules ke jo bhi task zaroori ho use utha leta hoon.

question_en: How do you react during a major crisis with tight deadlines and panic around you?
question_hi_en: Jab aas-paas panic ho aur tight deadlines wali major crisis aaye, toh aap kaise react karte hain?

options.option_en: I block out the noise and execute my specific core task with extreme precision.
options.option_hi_en: Main shor ko block kar deta hoon aur apne specific core task ko extreme precision ke sath karta hoon.

options.option_en: I remain silent, observe the chaos, and search for the hidden data that solves it.
options.option_hi_en: Main shaant rehta hoon, chaos observe karta hoon aur woh hidden data dhoondhta hoon jo problem solve kare.

options.option_en: I systematically break the crisis into manageable steps and enforce a strict protocol.
options.option_hi_en: Main crisis ko systematically chhote steps mein baantta hoon aur ek strict protocol laagu karta hoon.

options.option_en: I quickly synthesize multiple backup plans, combining different ideas to find a way out.
options.option_hi_en: Main jaldi se kayi backup plans synthesize karta hoon, aur rasta nikalne ke liye alag ideas combine karta hoon.

options.option_en: I confidently take command, calm the team down, and lead the charge to victory.
options.option_hi_en: Main confidence ke sath command leta hoon, team ko shaant karta hoon aur jeet ki taraf lead karta hoon.

options.option_en: I thrive in the chaos, instantly adapting my approach and rolling with the punches.
options.option_hi_en: Mujhe chaos mein kaam karna pasand hai, main turant apna approach adapt karta hoon aur situations ke hisab se badalta hoon.
